:my-attr: hello world

[subs=normal]
++++
This has *bold* and _italic_ and <html> and {my-attr}.
++++

[subs=none]
++++
This has *bold* and <html> and {my-attr}.
++++

[subs=specialchars]
++++
This has *bold* and <html> and {my-attr}.
++++

[subs=quotes]
++++
This has *bold* and <html> and {my-attr}.
++++

[subs="attributes,specialchars"]
++++
This has *bold* and <html> and {my-attr}.
++++

++++
Default passthrough: *bold* and <html> and {my-attr}.
++++
